output.reasoning: Text explicitly states "10% non-recoverable sales tax" on the $48,000 sedan purchase. Tax is mentioned and treatment is specified as non-recoverable, meaning it becomes part of the asset cost rather than a separate recoverable tax receivable.
output.tax_context: 10% non-recoverable sales tax on the $48,000 sedan purchase. Tax should be capitalized into the Motor vehicles asset cost, not recorded as a separate tax receivable line.
